title: How do I apply to UTech Jamaica?
content: You can apply to UTech Jamaica online through the UCAS system or the university's official admissions portal.

title: What documents are required for admission?
content: Applicants must submit certified copies of academic transcripts, identification, and supporting documents.

title: How do I reset my student portal password?
content: To reset your password, visit the UTech Jamaica student portal and click on the 'Forgot Password' option.

title: Where can I pay my tuition fees?
content: Tuition fees can be paid online via the UTech payment portal or at approved bank branches.

title: Who do I contact for academic advising?
content: Students should contact their assigned faculty advisor or the academic affairs office.
